calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jun-12-2003 Vacated

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-16-2003 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Settlement Conference this day in Dept. 501-A, JPT. Susan Lew, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Susan Lee.
Michael Hall, Esq. for Plaintiff Jesus Gomez also presents.
Cary Ketter, Esq. for Defendant Jose Luis Reyes also present.
Parties met in 501-A and reached a settlement by stipulation.
Terms of the settlement were read into the record as follows:
Stipulation for entry of judgment or dismissal with prejudice.
Plaintiff is entitled to a judgment against the defendant for restitution and possession of the premises of the property located at: 918 Moscow St., San Francisco, CA.
Defendant shall vacate the premises on or before July 31, 2003 in good, clean and undamaged condition.
Any property left will be disposed of, no person claiming a right to possession.
If Defendant complies, Plaintiff waive all unpaid rent and damages from March 1 through July 31, 2003, cash for keys and relocation expenses in the amount of $500.00 and dismissal of action with prejudice. Each to bear its own attorney's fees and costs.
If Defendant fails to vacate, Plaintiff shall be entitled to immediate judgment by Ex Parte application to the Court, upon 48 hours notice by FAX to Defendant's counsel.
Defendant waives any right to stay of execution; security deposit of $400.00 shall be distributed per CC 1950.5. Defendant waives last month's rent deposit and interest.
Parties waive any right under CC 1542 and release each from any claims.
All parties agreed to and signed the settlement in open court.
The Court deemed the matter settled and trial date is vacated.

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar May-15-2003 Advanced From Jun-09-03 To May-21-03 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 301

ORDER ADVANCING TIME TO HEAR DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar May-21-2003 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Sally Morin, Esq. of LAW OFFICES OF JAMES M. MILLAR 392-2800, for plaintiff and opposing party

RULING:
No other appearance on this matter. Tentative ruling adopted -- DEFENDANT MARY MORRIS's DEMURRER COMPLAINT -- Demurrer overruled; 5 days to answer. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. (PHA/301/EH) Reporter: Robert Balian, CSR #5220
